content.en:
After everything was ready, Ye Tian began to hit the ninth balance realm for the first time.

I have to say that the shackles of the Ninth Balance Realm are really indestructible, as difficult as ordinary people beating a stone wall.

Thundered!!!!

Under the impact again and again, Ye Tian's body seemed to be shattered.

In order to be able to break through, he even resorted to the rules of the Supreme Dao.

He felt that if he didn't use the Supreme Dao Rules, the chance of breaking through was too low, maybe a 1 in 10,000 chance.

And with the help of the Supreme Rules, the success rate will skyrocket.

Of course, it is also very dangerous to break through with the help of supreme rules.

With the help of the Supreme Dao Rules, Ye Tian continued to impact the ninth balance.

After a period of time, the bottleneck was torn apart by Ye Tian, but there was a problem in the fusion process of the three forces.

Suddenly, the balance was broken, Ye Tian's body shattered, and even if it healed quickly, the hidden injuries inside were difficult to recover.

"The breakthrough failed!"

In this regard, Ye Tian was not surprised at all, if it was a one-time success, it would be strange!

He took the fourth path, and every step was extremely difficult, that is, he had the hope of succeeding, and if he was another Origin Upper Realm Overlord, there was no way to raise his cultivation to his current level.

After re-replicating a replica body, Ye Tian began to impact for the second time.

There is no doubt that the second time failed.

In the following years, Ye Tian hit the ninth balance realm again and again, and after failing seven times, he successfully broke through to the eighth impact on the ninth balance realm.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy poured into his body.

And the energy of the ruin pole collar is relatively barren, resulting in a bit of movement, but fortunately, there are no strong people here, so it has not attracted much attention.

"The energy of the Ruin Extreme Territory is barren, but it is also many times richer than the current Origin Realm, which is enough for me to break through!"

Ye Tian's physical fitness continues to skyrocket, and this time the improvement is relatively large.

Moreover, after the ninth balance realm, his reincarnation Haotian body, reincarnation Haotian origin, and origin realm will were completely and perfectly fused into a new energy.

This new energy was very powerful, and even after absorbing the power of the Supreme Dao Rules, some subtle words gradually occurred.

"This energy is called the power of the Extreme Dao of Reincarnation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After a long time, his physical transformation can be regarded as truly stable.

"This time, not only has the Supreme Dao rules been greatly improved, but I have also reached the ninth Balance Realm, which is definitely comparable to the powerful Dual Supreme Dao Realm with my current strength. When I create the Supreme Dao Divine Power, then my strength can be called the top Dual Dao Realm powerhouse!" Ye Tian estimated.

So in the years that followed, he tried to create the supreme supernatural powers.

......

True River Valley.

Magawa Library.

Ye Tian came here, and as an elder of the True River Valley, he could enter here for free to browse through various inheritances.

There are many elders here who have left behind or gained all kinds of incomplete Dao supernatural experience from the outside world.

For countless years, he was not the only one who wanted to create the Supreme Dao Divine Power, but the other elders also tried, although they all failed, and they did not dare to continue trying, but they all left a little experience.

These experiences come together and are a lot of experiences.

Ye Tian came here to browse through these experiences and the traces of the incomplete Supreme Dao Divine Power, which would help him create the true Supreme Dao Divine Power.

After a period of time, he had browsed through the incomplete Dao Divine Powers experience here one by one.

"Most of these experiences are wrong, if you create the Supreme Dao Divine Power completely according to their experience, it will definitely not work!"

"However, these experiences are still very useful, at least they can avoid many detours, what I lack now is the experience of the Supreme Dao Realm, and this place just makes up for my shortcomings in this regard!"

Subsequently, he left the Makawa Library.

Then, he silently began to create the Supreme Dao Divine Power.

During this period, nothing happened in the True River Valley, except that the elders held occasional meetings to discuss how to develop the True River Valley.

Before you know it, thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created a suitable supreme dao supernatural power, this supreme dao supernatural power is still based on the supreme heaven poke and many other marksmanship supernatural powers, he named this supreme dao supernatural power as the supreme dao extreme spear technique!

This supreme path supernatural power has unparalleled terrifying speed, penetrating power, and explosive power, and it is a supreme supernatural power that is full of attack.

Even if you let the Cave Light of the First Weight Dao Realm copy the body to perform this Supreme Dao Divine Power, one blow can kill the powerful One Heavy Dao Realm powerhouse in an instant, which is enough to injure the top One Heavy Dao Realm powerhouse.

Of course, if you encounter another Supreme Dao realm that has created Supreme Dao Divine Powers, it will not necessarily be an opponent.

However, in the Infinite Domain, almost all of the powerhouses who can create the Superior Dao Divine Power are in the Dual Dao Realm or even the Triple Dao Realm.

Therefore, the one-fold Dao realm that can create the supreme Dao supernatural power is almost an invincible existence.

And Ye Tian's Cave Light Replica Body is not invincible at the moment, because he has not yet reached the cultivation of the peak of the Dao Realm, and the foundation of this Replica Body is not strong, so his strength cannot reach the Invincible Dao Realm.

But if you let the real body copy the body and cooperate with the Dao Extreme Spear Technique, that is the real horror, and in an instant, you can kill the ordinary double to the Dao realm powerhouse in an instant, and severely damage the powerful double to the Dao realm.

"One Supreme Dao Divine Power is not enough, if I create a few more Supreme Dao Divine Powers, my true body can copy the physical strength to be invincible in the Double Supreme Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the years that followed, he continued to study the supernatural powers.

Of course, the news that he had created the supreme supernatural powers, True River Valley did not know.

In the eyes of outsiders, he was still just an ordinary True River Valley Elder, not worth mentioning.

Dozens of years later.

Ye Tian and many other True River Valley elders received a notice from the True River Valley Lord and asked them all to go to the meeting.

Makawa Hall.

A supreme Dao realm descended, and they gathered here.

Many elders thought that this was just an ordinary meeting, but as soon as the Lord of the True River Valley spoke, he said, "Everyone, there is a very important matter to summon you here this time!"

Upon hearing that the words of the Lord of the True River Valley were very serious, many elders also became serious and listened one after another.

The Lord of the True River Valley continued: "You should know that my son True Yang and Miao An of the Taisu Palace are both Taoist couples, and Miao An's status is related to the future of our True River Valley. This time, Taisu Palace has a cultivation plan, and Miao An is competing for this place, once successful, the future of Miao An is limitless, and it is not a problem to become a triple or even a quadruple to the Dao realm. And Miao An needs our help from True River Valley, and I hope you can help. "
